{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305160443E1AB5AFA7FBC73AA26"}"},"total":42},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7470168681841165118","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常非常的好看啊一个晚上看完，很感人很让人动情，希望越来越多的人重视爱护小动物不管是珍惜动物还是平平常常的小动物，相信世界会越来越好！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739288529,"group_id":"7414070596192963609","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"安康","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9/YDcOT0HoON4TuIHQohRs=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/696caa0dc2b94ac6bcf5fd0c6605237d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790080&x-signature=0YY5%2FOTlgCsvwo%2BgEhWUS6Kwlsg%3D","user_id":"93370827881","user_name":"遗憾胖崽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93370827881","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7414070596192963609","book_info":{"abstract":"【萌宠可爱+温馨治愈+动物救助+轻直播】梁潇获得听懂动物说话的能力后，与萌宠可爱的小动物们开启了一段奇幻之旅。
他与宠物无障碍沟通，在线直播为宠主解决问题。
美女：“我的狗子最近见到我闺蜜就很凶，为什么？”
梁潇：“因为你闺蜜跟你老公搞暧昧了。”
他训练小动物线上线下表演才艺，培训“工作喵”“打工汪”卷职场，大批“猫医生”“狗保姆”“导游喵”“动物心理疗愈师”走上工作岗位，爆红全网；
他直播流浪动物救助，拦截运猫车，捣毁屠宰窝点，送偷猫偷狗贼、虐猫虐狗的人渣去踩缝纫机；
他建立动物救助中心，创办宠物乐园，给流浪动物当奶爸，倡导领养代替购买，寻找有缘领养人。
他的终极目标是让流浪动物都能被温柔以待，拥有一个温暖的家……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o44662746f96dbc06e4ecb70356010f75~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"箫声亮","author_id":"","book_id":"7414070596192963609","book_name":"懂动物说话，我救助动物爆红全网","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7414070775252009497","read_count":"824","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"394136"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"185","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,奶爸,直播,宠物,都市异能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a5036a26e4fa4fdda86df224a46526b2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779398165&x-signature=6qTu7i0a7I%2FZoeJB02Pb17oEEVA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3191197216031419","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"190"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305160443E1AB5AFA7FBC73AA26"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9214,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1141},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7477191086345306942","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"是一篇非常有爱心的一篇小说，讲述了流浪动物的心酸路程，因为在动物的眼里它不能分辨人类的好与坏，在他们的心中人类是能帮助他的，是可以给他一个温暖的家，还能带她去看病、给他买好吃的东西，能成为一个在同类眼中最幸福的猫猫或者是狗狗。同样在动物眼中有些人类不但不会爱他们，甚至还会欺负他们，虐杀他们。我只想说一句话，如果不爱，请不要伤害，谢谢"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740922780,"group_id":"7414070596192963609","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0Xrh4zfTxNyfMxpiEcj618=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/18a5ad5e6a474bbbb2436a2ebd3b44bb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790546&x-signature=J0FMESsbVQi97wAhCBc8em7Hgww%3D","user_id":"448239782080974","user_name":"地狱里最好看的彼岸花"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"448239782080974","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1748390663,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7414070596192963609","book_info":{"abstract":"【萌宠可爱+温馨治愈+动物救助+轻直播】梁潇获得听懂动物说话的能力后，与萌宠可爱的小动物们开启了一段奇幻之旅。
